title: Indonesia Blocks Polymarket Over President Exit Bets
summary: Indonesia has blocked the prediction market platform Polymarket due to bets on President Prabowo Subianto's early exit, citing concerns over gambling. This move highlights growing global scrutiny of decentralized prediction markets.
body:
Indonesia has blocked access to the decentralized prediction market platform Polymarket, following bets on the early departure of President Prabowo Subianto. The government cited concerns over gambling and the potential for market manipulation, leading to the decision to restrict access to the platform.

Polymarket, a decentralized platform that allows users to bet on real-world events using cryptocurrency, has faced increasing scrutiny from regulators worldwide. The Indonesian government's action comes as part of a broader trend of governments cracking down on prediction markets, which they argue can be used for gambling and speculative purposes.

This move impacts users in Indonesia who may no longer access Polymarket, potentially affecting the liquidity and participation in these markets. It also sets a precedent for other countries to follow suit, potentially leading to more restrictions on decentralized prediction platforms.

For users and enthusiasts of prediction markets, this development signals the need to stay informed about regulatory changes in their regions. Those currently using Polymarket should monitor for any updates on access restrictions and consider alternative platforms if necessary.
twitterThread: Indonesia just blocked Polymarket after bets on President Prabowo Subianto's early exit. Gambling concerns are driving this crackdown.
Polymarket lets users bet on real-world events with crypto. Indonesia's move highlights the growing global scrutiny of decentralized prediction markets.

If you're in Indonesia, Polymarket is now off-limits. Stay updated on local regulations and consider alternatives. Read more → https://www.cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-05-25-indonesia-blocks-polymarket-over-president-exit-bets
standaloneTweet: Indonesia blocked Polymarket over bets on President Prabowo Subianto's early exit. If you're in Indonesia, you can no longer access the platform. Stay informed on local regulations.
